client_steps.action: Pays annotation fee and submits receipt to Assessor's Office; Receives Transaction Claim Stub
Early on the 21-35 working days wait, be present (or send representative) to accompany office's Field Personnel during inspection of the property
Upon date of return, receives approved Tax Declaration, Owner's copy & Notice of Assessment, and sign Office Duplicate and Logbook

services.processing_time:
Variable: 21 working days (Reassessment of Lands w/o improvement) | 35 working days (Reassessment of Lands w/ Improvement OR New Assessment of Lands w/ or w/o Improvement)

Note: Date of release can be variable due to:
• Volume of Transactions
• Reassessment of Lands would most likely entail change in MARKET VALUE and ASSESSED VALUE and is subject to the Final Approval of the Provincial Assessor
• Lands declared for the 1st time whether with or without improvements will always be subject to the Final Approval of the Provincial Assessor.

services.service_name: Issuance of Updated Tax Declaration for Corrected Information e.g. Spelling of Name, Lot Area, Lot Number, etc...
services.who_may_avail: Real Property Owners and other agencies

requirements.requirement: Request Letter indicating the information that needs correction / update
Latest Realty Tax Receipt / Tax Clearance

requirements.where_to_secure: Owner as received from the Assessor's Office
Issued at Transaction window, paid at Municipal Treasurer's Office

conditional_requirements.condition: Provide the following applicable needed proof for the information to be corrected / updated (choose as applicable):

requirements.requirement: Certified True Copy of OCT / TCT

client_steps.action: Pays annotation fee and submits receipt to Assessor's Office; Receives Transaction Claim Stub

If Transaction falls in the SIMPLE category: 7 working days wait time. If property falls in the COMPLEX category: Early on the 21 or 35 working days wait, be present (or send representative) to accompany the office's Field Personnel during the inspection of the property being transacted
Upon date of return, receives approved Tax Declaration, Owner's copy & Notice of Assessment, and sign Office Duplicate and Logbook

services.processing_time:
Variable by transaction type:

**SIMPLE** (Real Properties with recent assessment not older than 1 year, no field inspection required): **7 working days**

**COMPLEX** (Real Properties with assessments older than 1 year, requiring field inspection):
- Properties without improvements: **21 working days**
- Properties with improvements: **35 working days**

Note: Date of release can be variable due to:
• Volume of Transactions
• SIMPLE transactions: No field inspection, approval at Local Assessor's level only
• COMPLEX transactions: Requires field inspection with longer timeline
• If there is an improvement in the property being transacted, reassessment may require approval of the Provincial Assessor

client_steps.action: Requests for Certified True Copy of TD or other Certification (Must provide Identification and/or authorization from the declarant / property / holdings and other related certifications)

services.processing_time:
3 minutes per Real Property Unit (may increase variably if client requests for OLDER versions of Tax Declaration - i.e., Tracebacks)

Note: Depending on how many Certified Copies / Certifications are requested, the transaction time can be faster or take longer.

services.service_name: Issuance of Building Permit (Highly Technical Transaction)
services.type_of_transaction: G2G – Government to Government; G2C - Government to Citizen
services.who_may_avail: Prospective house and/or building owners within the jurisdiction of Los Baños

requirements.requirement: Five (5) copies of filled-up and Notarized Unified Application Form for Building Permit
requirements.where_to_secure: Municipal Engineering Office and MEO Facebook Page

requirements.requirement: Three (3) photocopies of Valid PRC Licenses (I.D.) of all involved professionals (Engineers, Architects, etc.)
Four (4) copies of Notarized estimated value of the building structure to be erected
Four (4) sets of Drawing Plans (Signed and sealed by Engineers/Signed by Owner)
Three (3) sets of Lot Plan (Signed and sealed by Geodetic Engineer)
Four (4) copies of General Specifications (Signed and sealed by Engineer)
Two (2) copies of Structural Design Analysis (Signed and sealed by Engineer)
Two (2) copies of Electrical Design Analysis (Signed and sealed by Engineer)
Two (2) copies of Soil Boring Test (Signed and sealed by Engineer)
Three (3) photocopies of Original Certificate of Title (OCT)/Transfer Certificate of Title (TCT), and/or Deed of Absolute Sale and Lot Locational Plan from LRA
Three (3) photocopies of Tax Declaration and DENR Certificate of claimant (if OCT/TCT is unavailable)
Three (3) photocopies of Updated Tax Receipt
Construction Safety and Health Program (CSHP - DOLE)
DPWH Clearance for Construction along National Road
Other Agencies as maybe required related to the structure to be constructed (LLDA, DENR, NWRB, etc.)
Notarized Authorization Letter or Special Power of Attorney (SPA)
Photocopy of Valid I.D. of Owner/Signatory and Authorized Representative
Secretary's Certificate (If applicant is a corporation)

client_steps.action: Present and submit all the required documents
Payment to the cashier at Municipal Treasurer's Office; Issue Official Receipt
Release of building permit and Certificate

services.processing_time:
7 days (document evaluation) + 2 days (permit release) = **9 working days**

Note: Documents are endorsed to Assessor, Treasury, MPDO, and BFP for Assessment.

services.type_of_transaction: G2G – Government to Government; G2C - Government to Citizen
services.who_may_avail: Prospective house and/or building owners within the jurisdiction of Los Baños

requirements.requirement: Five (5) copies of filled-up and Notarized Unified Application Form for Building Permit
requirements.where_to_secure: Municipal Engineering Office and MEO Facebook Page

requirements.requirement: Three (3) photocopies of Valid PRC Licenses (I.D.) of all involved professionals
Four (4) copies of Notarized estimated value of the building structure to be erected
Four (4) sets of Drawing Plans (Signed and sealed by Engineers/Signed by Owner)
Three (3) sets of Lot Plan (Signed and sealed by Geodetic Engineer)
Four (4) copies of General Specifications (Signed and sealed by Engineer)
Two (2) copies of Structural Design Analysis (Signed and sealed by Engineer)
Two (2) copies of Electrical Design Analysis (Signed and sealed by Engineer)
Two (2) copies of Soil Boring Test (Signed and sealed by Engineer)
Three (3) photocopies of Original Certificate of Title (OCT)/Transfer Certificate of Title (TCT), and/or Deed of Absolute Sale and Lot Locational Plan from LRA (if lessee, Contract of Lease)
Three (3) photocopies of Tax Declaration and DENR Certificate of claimant (if OCT/TCT is unavailable)
Construction Safety and Health Program (CSHP - DOLE)
DPWH Clearance for Construction along National Road
Other Agencies as maybe required related to the structure to be constructed (LLDA, DENR, NWRB, etc.)
Notarized Authorization Letter or Special Power of Attorney (SPA)
Photocopy of Valid I.D. of Owner/Signatory and Authorized Representative
Secretary's Certificate (If applicant is a corporation)

client_steps.action: Present and submit all the required documents
Payment to the cashier at Municipal Treasurer's Office; Issue Official Receipt
Release of building permit and Certificate

services.processing_time:
1 day (document evaluation) + 1 day (permit release) = **2 working days**

Note: Documents are endorsed to Assessor, Treasury, MPDO, and BFP for Assessment.

client_steps.action: Requesting Vendor proceeds to MEO Market to request for certificate
client_steps.agency_action: RCC-I verify on record if requesting party has no outstanding obligations

client_steps.action: Requesting vendor pays the corresponding fee
client_steps.agency_action: RCC-I Collects payment, prepares certificate and Official Receipts

client_steps.action: Secures the approved certification/clearance and official receipt
client_steps.agency_action: MS III signs certificate, RCC-I issues signed certificate and official receipt

client_steps.agency_action: RCC-I checks record and advises the client of the amount to be paid

client_steps.action: Requesting Vendor pays the required amount and secures Official Receipt
client_steps.agency_action: Accepts payment and issues Official Receipts

client_steps.action: Requesting Vendor proceeds to MEO Market to pay utility fee
client_steps.agency_action: RCC-I advises the client of the amount to be paid

client_steps.agency_action: Accepts payment and issues Official Receipts

Market Supervisor III endorses request to Mayor for approval
RCC-I accepts payment and issues Official Receipts

BAI Regional Veterinary Quarantine Station or Checkpoints
LGU Office of Municipal Agriculture or Livestock Inspector
LGU Office of Municipal Agriculture or Livestock Inspector

client_steps.agency_action: Verify documents for validity and authenticity; record document numbers in entry log

client_steps.action: Unload livestock to designated pen for ante-mortem inspection
client_steps.agency_action: Count and record number of animals; assign pen number
Conduct ante-mortem inspection for clinical signs; record findings

services.who_may_avail: Authorized meat dealers, livestock suppliers, and individual clients

Pay fees and collect official receipt
Request and secure Local Meat Inspection Certificate (LMIC)
Receive or arrange delivery of carcass to market

services.service_name: Meat Inspection Services, Fee Assessment, and Issuance of Official Receipt
services.who_may_avail: Authorized meat dealers, livestock suppliers, and individual clients

requirements.requirement: Certificate of Meat Inspection or COMI (for frozen imported meat)
Delivery Receipt; Sales Invoice; Official Receipt (for frozen imported meat)
Meat Inspection Certificate or MIC (for fresh carcass)

client_steps.action: Present carcass for inspection, pertinent documents, and declare type/quantity
client_steps.agency_action: Receive and record carcass details; check documents and assign inspection batch
Conduct visual and physical inspection of carcass for safety and compliance
Compute fees based on type and quantity; issue official receipt
Stamp carcass as 'Inspected' if compliant; provide copy of receipt

services.who_may_avail: All residents of Los Baños and associations/organizations

client_steps.action: Logging in of the client/s on the logbook
State the purpose of such inquiry
Visit Municipal Agriculture Office to request for assorted seeds/seedlings

client_steps.agency_action: Examines the dogs/cats and verify age of pet

client_steps.action: Receive payment order (PO) for the registration fee
client_steps.agency_action: Issues payment order (PO) form to client for registration fee

client_steps.action: Pay the registration fee at the Treasury Office
client_steps.agency_action: Records the name and write the PO control number in the logbook
Verifies and records the Official receipt in the logbook and conducts vaccination

client_steps.action: Submit request letter as recipient of animal dispersal
client_steps.agency_action: Informs the client that the Animal Dispersal Program is on a 'first come first served basis' and must pass the criteria
Receives and reviews the Information sheet put on active file
Conducts field evaluation whether applicant can provide adequate budget for feed, potable water supply, suitable housing/pens

client_steps.action: Attend and participate in the seminars/trainings/meetings
client_steps.agency_action: Release the animal to the client and conduct seminars/training

client_steps.action: Bring animal for check-up and write in the logbook
client_steps.agency_action: Checks and treats the animal if medicine is available if not given prescription

services.service_name: Monitoring and Evaluation of Barangay Community Garden/Hapag, Backyard/Home Gardens, and Farmers Production Area

client_steps.action: Must be available for field visitation
client_steps.agency_action: Monitors and evaluates gardens and provides technical assistance

services.service_name: Issuance of Animal Health Certificates, Certificate of Acceptance, Certificate to Travel Livestock, Fish and Companion Animal

client_steps.action: Bring the documentary requirements and animal (if applicable) for physical examination
client_steps.agency_action: Check the validity of the requirements and interviews the applicant

client_steps.action: Conduct field visit and check the place (if applicable)
client_steps.agency_action: Conduct field visit and check the place

client_steps.action: Secure the approved certificate and sign in the logbook
client_steps.agency_action: Prepares and issues certificate to travel

client_steps.action: Bring request letter for tree cutting with necessary requirements
client_steps.agency_action: Interviews the applicant, conducts field visit

supporting_documents_detail.instruction: Select the type of certificate you need:

conditional_requirements.instruction: Requirements vary by certificate type (all certificates are ₱50)

options.condition: Animal Health Certificate
options.document: Vaccination record, plate number, handler's license, transport carrier license

options.condition: Certificate of Acceptance (Swine)
options.document: Veterinary health certificate, plate number, livestock handler's permit, livestock transport carrier license, animal disease monitoring compliance certificate, certificate of farm disease free status (ASF)

options.condition: Clearance to Travel Fish
options.document: Business permit/Mayor's permit number, type of vehicle and plate number (photocopy)

options.condition: Clearance to Travel Companion Animals
Certificate of No Objection (Tree Cutting)
options.document: Proof of ownership of land, endorsement from the barangay, request letter, authorization letter from the owner (original and photocopy, if not the owner)

services.service_name: ISSUANCE OF BARANGAY BUSINESS CLEARANCE AND BARANGAY BUILDING CLEARANCE

client_steps.action: Present the Barangay Business Clearance (prior year) and Official Receipt (prior year)
Present the barangay building permit payment order from the Building Official

fees.description: Depending on the Barangay Revenue Code and Building Official
